headline: Jim Cramer on Becton, Dickinson: “I Think You Buy Some and Then You Wait”
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) was among the stocks on which Jim Cramer gave his opinion, as he warned that increased AI-related spending might cause near-term headwind for stocks. When a caller mentioned that they had started a position in the stock, Cramer commented: I like Becton, Dickinson. It is selling frankly at the lowest […]
